tspan.tspan: aSoCC=allocated share of carrying capacities; L.=allocation level; E.U.=European Union; PBA=production-based accounting; CBA=consumption-based accounting; EM=enacting metric; GVA=gross value added;
GVAa=adjusted gross value added (via the Leontief inverse); FD=final demand; FDa=adjusted final demand (via the Ghosh inverse); TD=total demand (final + intermediate); E

text.tspan: category e; P=population; S=services delivered/produced; SP=sharing principle; UT=utilitarian; AR=acquired rights (grandfathering); EG=egalitarian; HR=historical responsibility; PR=prioritarian.
